chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1887 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 24.12.2025 Mr. Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Zia-ul-Haque Kamboh, Advocate, files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No. 6 and 7, which is taken on record. He submits that the petitioner has not approached Respondents No. 6 and 7. However, upon the petitioner's approach through a written application, he assures that the grievance will be resolved within two months. The counsel further admits that some differential amount remains outstanding. On the statement of the counsel, the counsel for the petitioner is satisfied that the case of the petitioner and the release of the differential amount will be decided within two months. Under these circumstances, the instant petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
